rows.title: Findings → Learnings redirect
rows.description: Legacy findings URL; history now lives at /learnings with per-finding routes.

rows.title: Orphan demonstration
rows.description: This page exists only to be orphaned: published to live, then its DA source deleted, leaving a live artifact with no owner. Wave 3 uses ...

rows.title: Dualform lab
rows.description: Six dualform specimens — ledger, orrery, vessel, lock, mic, compass — dual-state composites via CSS mask.

rows.title: Kitchen sink — Wave 2 module spectrum
rows.description: Full-spectrum EDS block page for da-cli 0.6.0 Wave 2 audits and contract verification.

rows.title: Learnings — dogfood flywheel history
rows.description: Index of field findings that turned into CLI fixes and regression locks during the da-cli 0.6.0 dogfood run.

rows.title: f001 — site info ignored target override
rows.description: site info resolved the wrong repository and ignored --org/--repo flags.

rows.title: f002 — design detect empty error envelope
rows.description: design detect and token-check always return structured status envelopes (clean / no-design-tokens).

rows.title: f003 — index build through da
rows.description: Query index required out-of-band admin POST until da index build existed.

rows.title: f004 — index env preview vs live
rows.description: index query --env preview silently returned live host results.

rows.title: f005 — route classify codebus vs orphan
rows.description: route classify treated live code-bus assets as orphans.

rows.title: f006 — stale contentbus after source delete
rows.description: After DA source delete, classify still returned contentbus from stale sourceLocation.

rows.title: f007 — route clean orphan delivery
rows.description: route clean skipped orphans and never unpreviewed/unpublished delivery.

rows.title: Sample modal
rows.description: This fragment is loaded into a dialog by the modal block. If you can read this, modal + fragment delivery worked.

rows.title: f008 — content merge path 404
rows.description: content merge folder paths refresh subtree documents (clone-compatible); no bare folder sourceGet.

rows.title: f009 — content put outside worktree
rows.description: Refuse out-of-tree puts by default; flag is intentional ownership of risk with clear agent recovery.

rows.title: f010 — relative media img about:error
rows.description: content put warns/rewrites/strict-fails host-less /media img URLs (f010 about:error).

rows.title: f011 — audit contracts misses autoblocks
rows.description: audit contracts inventories link-driven autoblocks (modal/widget/fragment) and verifies code assets.

rows.title: CLI surface — Wave 2 command ledger
rows.description: Addendum mapping da-cli commands run against this dogfood site for Wave 2 formal cut.

caveats: The public query index reflects published (live) content only. Previewing a page does not update the index; re-authoring a published page does not either until it is published again. Use `da --commit index build` after publish when the index must catch up.
